hero.title: An AI copilot that reads, answers and automates any web page
hero.subtitle: More than a chatbot — it understands the page you're on and drives the browser for you when you need it.
hero.trust: Works with OpenAI · Gemini · LM Studio · Didim

p1.title: Rewriting what the page already says
p1.desc: You read a long article and still have to summarize it yourself.

p2.title: The same clicks, every day
p2.desc: Repetitive forms and workflows eat up your focus time.

p3.title: AI answers, you still execute
p3.desc: The chatbot replies — then you carry out the actual task.

p4.title: Per-site automation is a coding project
p4.desc: Writing scripts for each site is too heavy for daily work.
